reference: Hello. Has the pain started after the surgery? This can be due to hernia development at the scar. If you are lean and thin, feeling pulsations in the mid-abdomen can be normal. A good ultrasonography with informed history to the sonologist may help you to find the problem.
text: Hello, as the pain started after the surgery, this can be due to hernia development at the scar. If you are lean and thin, feeling pulsations in the mid-abdominum can be normal. A good ultrasonography with informed history to the sonologist may help you to find the problem.
